title: Latest Oil Market News and Analysis for July 23
summary: Oil surged past $100 a barrel for the first time in two months after Iran-backed Houthi militants said they attacked two Saudi Arabian tankers in the Red Sea, escalating the Middle East conflict and threatening deeper supply disruptions.

title: BlackRock’s GIP Eyes Bundling Fund Stakes in Securitization Deal
summary: BlackRock Inc.’s Global Infrastructure Partners LP has been in discussions with investors to sell bonds backed by stakes in some of its private capital funds, joining a growing list of asset managers exploring ways to bolster returns on their holdings.

title: BlackRock, Coinbase and Strategy Pledge $15M to Quantum-Proof Bitcoin
summary: Nine of the biggest institutional names in Bitcoin formed a consortium to fund the developers working to keep the network secure—including from future quantum computers.

title: Southeast Asian Scam Networks Cost Victims Up to $114B in a Year: UN
summary: Once-fragmented syndicates have fused into a single, tech-driven criminal economy that increasingly runs on crypto, the UNODC warns.

title: Coinbase calls AI payments its ‘most high-conviction bet’ as businesses begin accepting agent payments

title: Strategy, BlackRock form Bitcoin Security Consortium to prepare for quantum computing threat
